'''Duenna Derida''' was the mother of [[Terra Derida|Terra]], [[Guerra Derida|Guerra]], and [[Paxxi Derida|Paxxi]]. After Terra had been memory-wiped, the girl had turned dark. She had forgotten completely who she was. Working for the [[Syndicat]] ensured Duenna residence at Syndicat headquarters, where she remained to watch over Terra. When Terra died, Duenna knew that Terra had finally remembered who she used to be. Although Duenna worked for the Syndicat, she secretly funneled funds to those who opposed it.

In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], she aided [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] on their mission to help destroy the Syndicat. She helped them break in to the headquarters one evening, overall kept them informed, and, after Kenobi was captured, she brought them news of his fate.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Hidden Past]]'' {{1st}}
